title: Project Management: Acronyms to Trello Tasks
description:
In today's fast-paced digital marketing environment, clear communication and organized task management are the foundation of project success. This Short Course was created to help digital marketing professionals master the essential language of project management and confidently use Trello to track work.

By completing this course, you'll be able to decode common project management acronyms that appear in emails, documentation, and team conversations, then immediately apply that knowledge by creating structured task cards in Trello complete with due dates, checklists, and assignments. These are practical skills you can use the very next day to contribute more effectively to your marketing team's projects.

By the end of this course, you will be able to:
Recognize and define fundamental project management acronyms including ETA, TBD, and RACI
Apply Trello to create task cards with titles, due dates, and action item checklists

This course is unique because it bridges the gap between project management fundamentals and hands-on digital tool proficiency, giving you both the vocabulary and the practical skills to contribute immediately to marketing project workflows.

To be successful in this course, you should have basic familiarity with digital collaboration tools and an interest in improving your project coordination skills.
